channel.title: Jian-Hai Chen Notes
channel.description: Research notes, short essays, and updates from Jian-Hai Chen.

item.title: South Asian wild boar and pig genomics
item.description: A ten-year project on wild boar origin, domestic pigs, and population genomics. Manuscript under review.

item.title: Notes
item.description: Research notes and short writing will be collected here.
